subject: aretomo (1.3.4) cannot reconstruct tomograms
body:
Dear all,
I found there are many active users of aretomo V1 here, so I hope to get 
some helpful insight regarding the usage of the software.
I found it very handy to quickly reconstruct tomograms using aretomo to do 
a quality check of the data collection. What I would do is just to use the 
same command to loop through all the TS I have. However, I noticed some of 
the results are aligned TS instead of tomograms when using Sart 
reconstruction. When I use wbp reconstruction, some of the TS would just 
fail, producing artifacts or sometimes a smeared frame, etc. I noticed that 
those failed in Sart are not necessarily the same TS failed in wbp. 
After some inspection (mostly using Sart), I found that this issue can be 
resolved by adjusting AlignZ and VolZ slightly. Apparently certain 
combination of the parameters will just trigger tomogram/TS generation, 
which is very confusing. I just wonder if anyone else noticed the same 
behavior, or if there is a solution for using a generic command to do batch 
tomogram reconstruction.

Best,
Qiuye
